boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: standing PO authorizes recurring invoice within tolerance.

boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: SRC-CD4055F2E56D-CTL confirms the standing PO window and tolerance band is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action. SRC-CD4055F2E56D-POL requires exact boundary closure before execution. SRC-CD4055F2E56D-FBK warns history alone is not authority. SRC-CD4055F2E56D-BND requires source-control records, not tone or urgency.

final_answer: Source records do not close the action boundary. The control record confirms the standing PO window and tolerance band is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped differently. Per policy, AP may proceed only after exact source closure. Escalate to resolve the open dependency before any payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action.
